title: cyclobalanopsis muricata
intro: Cyclobalanopsis muricata, also known as the Taiwan chestnut or Taiwanese chinquapin, is a species of deciduous tree in the beech family Fagaceae. The medicinal properties of Cyclobalanopsis muricata include its use in treating fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and boost the immune system. Cyclobalanopsis muricata is often used in herbal preparations such as tea, infusions, and extracts, and is also consumed as a food source, particularly in traditional Taiwanese cuisine.
